title: Navas ZA Megas
description: Adds All Megas from Pokemon Legends ZA into Cobblemon! (MSD Required)
body:
# ⚠️ READ BEFORE INSTALLING ⚠️

The original owners of Navas have stoped updating this addon and deleted their discord. It was given to MSD moderators to continue the addon till we can fully implement it into MSD!

# **❌ Compatibility & Setup Rules (Important)**

DO NOT use this alongside zamegaearly
→ Its content is already fully integrated here.

DO NOT mix this with other Mega packs
→ Conflicts will happen.

Delete Eternal Flower Floette data from all packs
→ Except: Mega Showdown and Cobblemon
→ Required since v1.3.1

Delete ALL previous versions of this mod
→ Includes resource packs and data packs
→ Required since v1.4 (this is now a mod, not a pack)

# **🔍 In-Game Info**

Abilities

Ability effects

Mega Stone crafting recipes

## **👉 All viewable in-game.**
Please don’t ask for lists—we put the info where it belongs.

# **✨ Mega Pokémon Included (45 Total, DLC Included)**

In the 1.5.2 Release they now all use the same abilities as the Legends ZA OU format on Pokemon Showdown. Look there if you want to know exact details of what abilties they got!
